message: Create a URL shortener web app. FastAPI + SQLite backend with: POST /shorten (accepts url, returns short code), GET /{code} (redirects to original url), GET /stats/{code} (returns click count). Simple HTML frontend with a form. Separate files: models.py, routes.py, database.py, main.py, templates/index.html. Use proper error handling.
